data.body: Introduce a shared runtime/interface for interactive agents so terminal-manager no longer hard-codes Claude as the only interactive dialect. The shared layer should let each agent declare capabilities such as interactive vs one-shot support, prompt transport, follow-up support, turn-result detection, session-end detection, stdin draining behavior, and inactivity watchdog policy. It should also centralize process-group kill, close-input timing, normalized event emission, and post-exit validation hooks so Codex, OpenCode, Gemini, Copilot, and Claude all follow the same protocol.
data.title: Implement a shared interactive agent session runtime
